requirement_topic.en: Low Voltage Safety — EV Charging Equipment (General)
requirement_topic.zh: 低压安全——电动汽车充电设备（通用）
requirement_topic.zht: 低壓安全——電動汽車充電設備（通用）

summary.en: EV charging equipment placed on the Polish/EU market must comply with the Low Voltage Directive 2014/35/EU, ensuring it is designed and manufactured to be safe when correctly installed and maintained. Equipment must meet the Essential Safety Requirements (Annex I) covering protection against electric shock, insulation, overcurrent/overtemperature protection, and clearances. Harmonised standard EN IEC 61851-1:2019 (Mode 1–4 conductive charging, AC and DC, general requirements) provides a presumption of conformity. In Poland, UDT (Office of Technical Inspection, Urząd Dozoru Technicznego) may require separate notification or inspection for EV charging equipment above certain power thresholds or in specific installation categories — verify current UDT scope before installation.
summary.zh: 在波兰/欧盟市场销售的电动汽车充电设备须符合低压指令2014/35/EU，确保其在正确安装及维护条件下安全运行。设备须满足附件I基本安全要求，涵盖防触电、绝缘、过流/过温保护及电气间隙。协调标准EN IEC 61851-1:2019（模式1–4传导充电，交直流，通用要求）可推定符合指令。在波兰，技术监察局（UDT）可能对超过特定功率阈值或特定安装类别的电动汽车充电设备要求单独通知或检验——安装前请核实当前UDT适用范围。
summary.zht: 在波蘭/歐盟市場銷售的電動汽車充電設備須符合低壓指令2014/35/EU，確保其在正確安裝及維護條件下安全運行。設備須滿足附件I基本安全要求，涵蓋防觸電、絕緣、過流/過溫保護及電氣間隙。協調標準EN IEC 61851-1:2019（模式1–4傳導充電，交直流，通用要求）可推定符合指令。在波蘭，技術監察局（UDT）可能對超過特定功率閾值或特定安裝類別的電動汽車充電設備要求單獨通知或檢驗——安裝前請核實當前UDT適用範圍。

standards_or_laws: EN IEC 61851-1:2019 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements
Ustawa o dozorze technicznym (Poland Technical Inspection Act) — verify UDT scope for EV charging equipment categories

summary.en: China commonly references GB/T 18487.1-2015 (Electric vehicle conductive charging system — General requirements), which is technically aligned with IEC 61851-1 but incorporates national deviations. It is enforced under the GB framework administered by SAMR/SAC. GB/T 18487.1 testing and certification by a Chinese CNAS-accredited lab is NOT recognised as equivalent to EN IEC 61851-1 testing under the EU LVD conformity assessment pathway.
summary.zh: 中国常见参考标准为GB/T 18487.1-2015（电动汽车传导充电系统——通用要求），技术上与IEC 61851-1相关但含有国家偏差，由市场监管总局/国家标准化管理委员会监督执行。国内CNAS认可实验室依据GB/T 18487.1出具的检测及认证，不被欧盟LVD合格评定程序直接认可为等同。
summary.zht: 中國常見參考標準為GB/T 18487.1-2015（電動汽車傳導充電系統——通用要求），技術上與IEC 61851-1相關但含有國家偏差，由市場監管總局/國家標準化管理委員會監督執行。國內CNAS認可實驗室依據GB/T 18487.1出具的檢測及認證，不被歐盟LVD合格評定程序直接認可為等同。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.1-2015 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — General requirements (SAMR/SAC)

gap.en: Exporters should build an EU conformity file against the LVD essential safety requirements and may use EN IEC 61851-1:2019 testing as evidence for presumption of conformity. Existing Chinese GB/T 18487.1 test reports do not automatically substitute because scope, deviations, connector assumptions and documentation differ. A Notified Body is not mandatory for LVD; manufacturer self-declaration with a Technical File is the normal route. Documentation gap: EU Declaration of Conformity, CE marking, and EU-language technical instructions are all required. For Poland specifically: verify UDT inspection scope; Polish-language instructions and safety sheets are expected by Polish installers and inspection bodies.
gap.zh: 出口商应围绕低压指令基本安全要求建立欧盟合规技术文件，并可采用EN IEC 61851-1:2019检测作为推定符合性的证据。现有GB/T 18487.1检测报告不会自动替代，因为范围、偏差、接口假设及文件要求不同。LVD通常不强制要求公告机构；制造商自我声明加技术文件是常规路径。文件差距：需提供欧盟符合性声明、CE标志及欧盟语言技术说明书。对于波兰：核实UDT检验适用范围；波兰安装商和检验机构期望提供波兰语说明书和安全表。
gap.zht: 出口商應圍繞低壓指令基本安全要求建立歐盟合規技術文件，並可採用EN IEC 61851-1:2019檢測作為推定符合性的證據。現有GB/T 18487.1檢測報告不會自動替代，因為範圍、偏差、接口假設及文件要求不同。LVD通常不強制要求公告機構；製造商自我聲明加技術文件是常規路徑。文件差距：需提供歐盟符合性聲明、CE標誌及歐盟語言技術說明書。對於波蘭：核實UDT檢驗適用範圍；波蘭安裝商和檢驗機構期望提供波蘭語說明書和安全表。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation: Directive 2014/35/EU and CE marking before EU/Polish market placement. EN IEC 61851-1:2019 is voluntary harmonised-standard evidence for presumption of conformity; alternative technical solutions are allowed if the manufacturer demonstrates compliance with the LVD essential safety requirements. UDT inspection obligations in Poland may apply to certain installation categories — verify current scope.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — GB/T 18487.1 compliance required under SAMR framework

source.publisher: Office of Technical Inspection (UDT — Urząd Dozoru Technicznego)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] CE marking under LVD 2014/35/EU is mandatory for Polish/EU market placement. EN IEC 61851-1:2019 is a voluntary harmonised standard that can grant presumption of conformity; it is not the legal obligation itself. Chinese GB/T 18487.1 certification does not by itself satisfy the EU conformity assessment pathway. Verify UDT inspection requirements for the specific EV charger category in Poland and ensure Polish-language instructions are provided.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 依据LVD 2014/35/EU，CE标志为波兰/欧盟市场销售的强制要求。EN IEC 61851-1:2019是可用于电动汽车传导充电通用要求推定符合性的自愿协调标准，并非法律义务本身。中国GB/T 18487.1认证本身不满足欧盟合格评定路径。请核实波兰特定电动汽车充电设备类别的UDT检验要求，并确保提供波兰语说明书。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 依據LVD 2014/35/EU，CE標誌為波蘭/歐盟市場銷售的強制要求。EN IEC 61851-1:2019是可用於電動汽車傳導充電通用要求推定符合性的自願協調標準，並非法律義務本身。中國GB/T 18487.1認證本身不滿足歐盟合格評定路徑。請核實波蘭特定電動汽車充電設備類別的UDT檢驗要求，並確保提供波蘭語說明書。

requirement_topic.en: DC Charging Station Safety — EV Conductive Charging
requirement_topic.zh: 直流充电站安全——电动汽车传导充电
requirement_topic.zht: 直流充電站安全——電動汽車傳導充電

summary.en: DC charging stations (Mode 4, off-board chargers) placed on the Polish/EU market must comply with the Low Voltage Directive 2014/35/EU where within scope. EN IEC 61851-23:2023 (Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 23: DC EV charging station) is a current product standard that may be used as technical evidence and, where cited as harmonised, gives presumption of conformity; it is not itself the mandatory legal obligation. Key technical topics include isolation monitoring, interlock systems, control pilot functions, maximum voltage/current ratings, and communication protocols for DC supply. CCS2 (Combined Charging System Type 2) connector compatibility is required for Polish/EU market entry under AFIR.
summary.zh: 投放波兰/欧盟市场的直流充电站（模式4，非车载充电机）在适用范围内须符合低压指令2014/35/EU。EN IEC 61851-23:2023（电动汽车传导充电系统——第23部分：直流电动汽车充电站）是现行产品标准，可作为技术证据使用；在被列为协调标准时可产生推定符合性，但其本身并非强制性法律义务。核心技术主题包括绝缘监控、互锁系统、控制引导功能、最大电压/电流额定值及直流供电通信协议。根据AFIR，进入波兰/欧盟市场须配备CCS2（组合充电系统2型）连接器。
summary.zht: 投放波蘭/歐盟市場的直流充電站（模式4，非車載充電機）在適用範圍內須符合低電壓指令2014/35/EU。EN IEC 61851-23:2023（電動汽車傳導充電系統——第23部分：直流電動汽車充電站）是現行產品標準，可作為技術證據使用；在被列為協調標準時可產生推定符合性，但其本身並非強制性法律義務。核心技術主題包括絕緣監控、互鎖系統、控制導引功能、最大電壓/電流額定值及直流供電通訊協議。根據AFIR，進入波蘭/歐盟市場須配備CCS2（組合充電系統2型）連接器。

standards_or_laws: EN IEC 61851-23:2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 23: DC EV charging station (current edition, supersedes 2014)
Regulation (EU) 2023/1804 (AFIR) — CCS2 connector requirement for publicly accessible DC chargers

summary.en: China's DC charging station domestic equivalent is GB/T 18487.3-2001 (AC/DC electric vehicle charging station — the only published Part 3 of the 18487 series; note: a GB/T 18487.3-2015 does not exist). The current DC system standard is GB/T 18487.5-2024 (DC charging system for GB/T 20234.3 connector). The DC coupler standard is GB/T 20234.3-2023 (supports up to 1500 V / 800 A). CQC or CNAS certification to these Chinese standards is not accepted under the EU LVD CE marking pathway.
summary.zh: 中国直流充电站国内对应标准为GB/T 18487.3-2001（交直流电动汽车充电站——GB/T 18487系列第3部分的唯一发布版本；注：GB/T 18487.3-2015并不存在）。现行直流系统标准为GB/T 18487.5-2024（适用于GB/T 20234.3接口的直流充电系统）。直流耦合器标准为GB/T 20234.3-2023（支持最高1500V/800A）。依据上述中国标准获得的CQC或CNAS认证，在欧盟LVD CE标志合格评定路径下不被接受。
summary.zht: 中國直流充電站國內對應標準為GB/T 18487.3-2001（交直流電動汽車充電站——GB/T 18487系列第3部分的唯一發布版本；注：GB/T 18487.3-2015並不存在）。現行直流系統標準為GB/T 18487.5-2024（適用於GB/T 20234.3接口的直流充電系統）。直流耦合器標準為GB/T 20234.3-2023（支持最高1500V/800A）。依據上述中國標準獲得的CQC或CNAS認證，在歐盟LVD CE標誌合格評定路徑下不被接受。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.3-2001 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — AC/DC electric vehicle charging station (only published edition; no 2015 revision exists)
GB/T 18487.5-2024 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 5: DC charging system for GB/T 20234.3 (current DC system standard)
GB/T 20234.3-2023 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 3: DC charging coupler (supersedes 2015 edition)

gap.en: DC charging stations exported to Poland/EU should be assessed against the LVD essential safety requirements and may use EN IEC 61851-23:2023 testing as presumption-of-conformity evidence where applicable. Particular attention is needed for: (1) CCS2 connector compliance vs. Chinese GB/T connector — a hardware redesign gap; (2) isolation monitoring requirements per European TN-S or TT grid topology common in Poland; (3) ISO 15118 / DIN 70121 communication protocol compatibility vs. Chinese GB/T 27930 CAN; (4) cold-temperature operation ratings for Polish winter conditions. Chinese DC stations using GB/T 20234.3 plugs require hardware redesign for Polish/EU CCS2 practice. UDT may have inspection requirements for high-power DC charger installations in Poland.
gap.zh: 出口波兰/欧盟的直流充电站应针对LVD基本安全要求进行评估，并可在适用时采用EN IEC 61851-23:2023检测作为推定符合性证据。重点关注：（1）CCS2连接器合规性与中国GB/T连接器的差异——存在硬件重新设计差距；（2）波兰常见TN-S或TT电网拓扑下的绝缘监控要求；（3）ISO 15118 / DIN 70121通信协议兼容性与中国GB/T 27930 CAN的差异；（4）波兰冬季条件下的低温运行额定值。使用GB/T 20234.3插头的中国直流充电站须为波兰/欧盟CCS2实践进行硬件重新设计。UDT可能对波兰大功率直流充电设施有检验要求。
gap.zht: 出口波蘭/歐盟的直流充電站應針對LVD基本安全要求進行評估，並可在適用時採用EN IEC 61851-23:2023檢測作為推定符合性證據。重點關注：（1）CCS2連接器合規性與中國GB/T連接器的差異——存在硬件重新設計差距；（2）波蘭常見TN-S或TT電網拓撲下的絕緣監控要求；（3）ISO 15118 / DIN 70121通訊協議相容性與中國GB/T 27930 CAN的差異；（4）波蘭冬季條件下的低溫運行額定值。使用GB/T 20234.3插頭的中國直流充電站須為波蘭/歐盟CCS2實務進行硬件重新設計。UDT可能對波蘭大功率直流充電設施有檢驗要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation: CE marking under Directive 2014/35/EU where the charger is within LVD scope; CCS2 connector required for publicly accessible DC chargers under AFIR. EN IEC 61851-23:2023 is a voluntary technical standard that may support presumption of conformity where harmonised/cited; alternatives are allowed if the manufacturer demonstrates compliance with the Directive. Verify UDT inspection obligations for high-power DC charging installations in Poland.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 18487.5-2024 is the current DC charging system standard; CCC mandatory from 1 March 2025 under CNCA-C25-01:2024

source.publisher: Office of Technical Inspection (UDT — Urząd Dozoru Technicznego)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] DC charging stations require CE marking under the applicable EU legislation, including LVD where in scope. EN IEC 61851-23:2023 is a voluntary product standard used as technical evidence or presumption-of-conformity support where harmonised; it is not mandatory in itself. Chinese GB/T 18487.3 certification is not accepted as an EU conformity assessment substitute. A significant hardware gap exists where Chinese DC stations use GB/T connectors incompatible with EU/Polish CCS2 practice. Verify UDT requirements and ensure cold-temperature operational data covers Polish winter conditions.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 直流充电站须依据适用欧盟法律取得CE标志，其中在LVD范围内的产品须符合低压指令。EN IEC 61851-23:2023是可作为技术证据或在协调时用于推定符合性的自愿产品标准，并非自身强制。中国GB/T 18487.3认证不能替代欧盟合格评定。若中国直流充电站使用与欧盟/波兰CCS2实践不兼容的GB/T连接器，则存在重大硬件差距。请核实UDT要求，并确保低温运行数据覆盖波兰冬季条件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 直流充電站須依據適用歐盟法律取得CE標誌，其中在LVD範圍內的產品須符合低電壓指令。EN IEC 61851-23:2023是可作為技術證據或在協調時用於推定符合性的自願產品標準，並非自身強制。中國GB/T 18487.3認證不能替代歐盟合格評定。若中國直流充電站使用與歐盟/波蘭CCS2實務不相容的GB/T連接器，則存在重大硬件差距。請核實UDT要求，並確保低溫運行數據覆蓋波蘭冬季條件。

requirement_topic.en: Electrical Installation Safety — EV Charging in Buildings (IEC 60364-7-722)
requirement_topic.zh: 建筑内电动汽车充电电气安装安全（IEC 60364-7-722）
requirement_topic.zht: 建築內電動汽車充電電氣安裝安全（IEC 60364-7-722）

summary.en: Poland member-state electrical installation law and grid/installer rules govern the building-side circuits supplying EV charging points. IEC 60364-7-722 / HD 60364-7-722 provide the commonly adopted technical installation route covering protective measures (RCD type B or A+DC detection), wiring, earthing, and load management. These standards apply to the building-side installation infrastructure, not the charger product itself, but exported EV chargers should be compatible with these installation requirements so they can be accepted by Polish installers, DSOs, and UDT inspectors. Poland uses TN-S and TT earthing systems for domestic and commercial installations. Polish building regulations (Warunki Techniczne) and electrical installation rules implement HD 60364 series through Polish national adoption (PN-HD 60364 series).
summary.zh: 波兰成员国电气安装法律及电网/安装方规则规范电动汽车充电点的建筑侧供电回路。IEC 60364-7-722 / HD 60364-7-722提供常用的技术安装路径，涵盖保护措施（B型RCD或A型+直流检测）、布线、接地及负荷管理。这些标准适用于建筑侧安装基础设施，而非充电设备产品本身，但出口波兰的充电设备应与相关安装要求兼容，以便获得波兰安装商、DSO及UDT检查员接受。波兰住宅和商业安装采用TN-S和TT接地系统。波兰建筑法规（Warunki Techniczne）和电气安装规则通过波兰国家采纳版本（PN-HD 60364系列）实施HD 60364系列标准。
summary.zht: 波蘭成員國電氣安裝法律及電網/安裝方規則規範電動汽車充電點的建築側供電迴路。IEC 60364-7-722 / HD 60364-7-722提供常用的技術安裝路徑，涵蓋保護措施（B型RCD或A型+直流檢測）、布線、接地及負荷管理。這些標準適用於建築側安裝基礎設施，而非充電設備產品本身，但出口波蘭的充電設備應與相關安裝要求相容，以便獲得波蘭安裝商、DSO及UDT檢查員接受。波蘭住宅和商業安裝採用TN-S和TT接地系統。波蘭建築法規（Warunki Techniczne）和電氣安裝規則通過波蘭國家採納版本（PN-HD 60364系列）實施HD 60364系列標準。

standards_or_laws: IEC 60364-7-722:2018 — Low-voltage electrical installations — Part 7-722: Requirements for special installations or locations — Supply of electric vehicles
HD 60364-7-722 (CENELEC harmonised document) as adopted in Poland as PN-HD 60364-7-722
Polish Warunki Techniczne (Technical Conditions for Construction) — building-side electrical installation law
UDT (Urząd Dozoru Technicznego) — Technical Inspection Act requirements for certain EV charging installation categories

summary.en: China addresses EV charging installation primarily through GB 50966-2014 (Code for design of electric vehicle charging station) and GB/T 51313-2018 (Technical standard for electric vehicle charging infrastructure), administered by the Ministry of Housing and Urban-Rural Development (MOHURD). These cover site design and installation but differ from IEC 60364-7-722 in RCD type requirements, earthing system assumptions (TN-S vs. Chinese practice), and load management protocols. Chinese installation documentation is not accepted as evidence of compliance with Polish/EU member-state installation standards.
summary.zh: 中国主要通过GB 50966-2014（电动汽车充电站设计规范）及GB/T 51313-2018（电动汽车充电基础设施技术标准）处理充电安装事宜，由住房和城乡建设部负责管理。上述标准涵盖场地设计及安装，但在RCD类型要求、接地系统假设（TN-S与中国实践的差异）及负荷管理协议方面与IEC 60364-7-722存在差异。中国安装文件不被接受作为符合波兰/欧盟成员国安装标准的证据。
summary.zht: 中國主要通過GB 50966-2014（電動汽車充電站設計規範）及GB/T 51313-2018（電動汽車充電基礎設施技術標準）處理充電安裝事宜，由住房和城鄉建設部負責管理。上述標準涵蓋場地設計及安裝，但在RCD類型要求、接地系統假設（TN-S與中國實踐的差異）及負荷管理協議方面與IEC 60364-7-722存在差異。中國安裝文件不被接受作為符合波蘭/歐盟成員國安裝標準的證據。

standards_or_laws: GB 50966-2014 — Code for design of electric vehicle charging station (MOHURD) (confirmed to exist; enforced by MOHURD/MIIT)
GB/T 51313-2018 — Technical standard for electric vehicle charging infrastructure (confirmed to exist; enforced by MOHURD/MIIT)

gap.en: IEC 60364-7-722 / HD 60364-7-722 / PN-HD 60364-7-722 are installation standards — they govern fixed wiring and protection devices at the building side, not the charger product itself. However, exported EV chargers should declare compatibility with Type B RCDs or incorporate internal DC fault protection to allow Type A RCDs under Polish/EU installation practice. A charger that requires installation conditions not achievable under Polish electrical codes will fail field acceptance by Polish DSOs, installers, or UDT. Chinese charger datasheets often omit compatibility statements expected by Polish installers and grid operators. Polish winter conditions (below -10°C ambient) may additionally require charger cold-temperature ratings to be clearly documented.
gap.zh: IEC 60364-7-722 / HD 60364-7-722 / PN-HD 60364-7-722为安装标准，规范建筑侧固定布线及保护装置，而非充电设备产品本身。但出口波兰的充电设备应依据波兰/欧盟安装实践声明与B型RCD兼容，或内置直流故障保护以允许使用A型RCD。若充电设备要求的安装条件在波兰电气规范下无法实现，将无法通过波兰DSO、安装商或UDT的现场验收。中国充电设备产品规格书通常未包含波兰安装商及电网运营商所期望的兼容性声明。波兰冬季条件（环境温度低于-10°C）可能还要求明确记录充电设备的低温额定值。
gap.zht: IEC 60364-7-722 / HD 60364-7-722 / PN-HD 60364-7-722為安裝標準，規範建築側固定布線及保護裝置，而非充電設備產品本身。但出口波蘭的充電設備應依據波蘭/歐盟安裝實務聲明與B型RCD相容，或內置直流故障保護以允許使用A型RCD。若充電設備要求的安裝條件在波蘭電氣規範下無法實現，將無法通過波蘭DSO、安裝商或UDT的現場驗收。中國充電設備產品規格書通常未包含波蘭安裝商及電網運營商所期望的相容性聲明。波蘭冬季條件（環境溫度低於-10°C）可能還要求明確記錄充電設備的低溫額定值。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation sits in Polish member-state electrical installation law, building regulations (Warunki Techniczne), DSO grid codes, and UDT permitting/inspection rules. IEC 60364-7-722 / HD 60364-7-722 / PN-HD 60364-7-722 are voluntary or nationally adopted technical standards commonly used to demonstrate accepted installation practice; product compatibility is a practical market requirement in Poland.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic installation — GB 50966 / GB/T 51313 under MOHURD (GB 50966-2014 and GB/T 51313-2018 confirmed as published standards enforced by MOHURD; check SAC for any 2023-2025 revisions)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] PN-HD 60364-7-722 governs building-side EV charging installation practice in Poland. EV chargers exported to Poland should be compatible with Type B RCD and TN-S/TT earthing requirements expected by Polish installers, DSOs, and UDT. This is distinct from product-level CE marking under LVD, but non-compatibility can block field installation in Poland. Chinese installation standards (GB 50966 / GB/T 51313) are not substitutes. Ensure cold-temperature ratings cover Polish winter ambient conditions.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] PN-HD 60364-7-722规范波兰建筑侧电动汽车充电安装实践。出口波兰的充电设备应与波兰安装商、DSO及UDT期望的B型RCD及TN-S/TT接地要求兼容。这与产品层面依据LVD取得CE标志不同，但不兼容会阻碍在波兰的现场安装。中国安装标准（GB 50966 / GB/T 51313）不可替代。请确保低温额定值覆盖波兰冬季环境条件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] PN-HD 60364-7-722規範波蘭建築側電動汽車充電安裝實務。出口波蘭的充電設備應與波蘭安裝商、DSO及UDT期望的B型RCD及TN-S/TT接地要求相容。這與產品層面依據LVD取得CE標誌不同，但不相容會阻礙在波蘭的現場安裝。中國安裝標準（GB 50966 / GB/T 51313）不可替代。請確保低溫額定值覆蓋波蘭冬季環境條件。
